betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Welcome to the §mJungle§r Void!

So, you've decided to get the GoG addon. That's good. It's certainly much more up-to-date than the github wiki we have for GoG progress. 

Before we begin, allow me to explain what this addon does:

On the whole, it's an information database, adding pages to the questbook and guideNH so you don't have to leave the game to find out how to get stuff. 

Secondly, it has modes!

Much like how project ozone has normal, titan, and kappa, this addon has Garden of Grind, Skyblock, Garden of Grindless, and Questless Garden of Grind. The more specific changes for each mode can be found in their quests, but overall, except for Garden of Grind, the modes make some amount of changes to the base GTNH recipes, either to make the game more similar to a normal Skyblock, or to lessen the grind for a normal GoG run. Or just disable quest rewards :p
